title: Manage API Tokens for CI/CD Integration
description: Developer wants to create an API token for their CI/CD pipeline to automate deployments on Mittwald.
prompt: I need to set up automated deployments from our GitLab CI pipeline to my Mittwald hosting. Use the Mittwald MCP tools to first show me what API tokens I already have, then create a new one called 'gitlab-deploy' with both read and write permissions.

I need to set up automated deployments from our GitLab CI pipeline. Can you help me create an API token that I can use for this? First, show me what tokens I already have, then create a new one called 'gitlab-deploy' that I can use for deployments. Use the available Mittwald MCP tools to complete this - discover any needed information yourself and make reasonable choices for parameters I didn't specify. Do not ask me questions - just use the tools to get it done.
